Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It makes me kind of nervous being alone together in my room like this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hey, um... Since you're here, why don't we have some fun together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 13 7 5 2}W-Wait, I didn't mean it like that! We could just, y'know... play cards or something![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a long time with Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond between us...[n]{f 1 1}
